Subsequent providers must match         the current ratio; excess `amountBDesired` is returned implicitly         (callers should set `amountBDesired` to maximum they are willing).","params":{"amountADesired":"Amount of tokenA the caller wants to deposit.","amountAMin":"Minimum tokenA actually deposited (slippage guard).","amountBDesired":"Maximum amount of tokenB the caller is willing to deposit.","amountBMin":"Minimum tokenB actually deposited (slippage guard)."},"returns":{"amountA":" Actual tokenA deposited.","amountB":" Actual tokenB deposited.","liquidity":" LP tokens minted."}},"removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountAMin":"Minimum tokenA to receive (slippage guard).","amountBMin":"Minimum tokenB to receive (slippage guard).","lpAmount":"Amount of LP tokens to burn."},"returns":{"amountA":" TokenA returned.","amountB":" TokenB returned."}},"swap(address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountIn":"Exact amount of tokenIn to swap.","minAmountOut":"Minimum amount of output token (slippage protection).","tokenIn":"Address of the input token (must be tokenA or tokenB)."},"returns":{"amountOut":" Amount of output token received."}}},"title":"AMM","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Add liquidity to the pool."},"getAmountOut(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Compute output amount given input amount and reserves.         Applies 0.3 % fee: amountOut = (amountIn * 997 * reserveOut) / (reserveIn * 1000 + amountIn * 997)"},"getK()":{"notice":"Returns the current k value."},"getPrice()":{"notice":"Returns current pool price as tokenB per tokenA (18 decimals)."},"removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Remove liquidity from the pool."},"swap(address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Swap an exact amount of one token for the other."}},"notice":"Constant-product Automated Market Maker (x * y = k).  Key design decisions:  \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  \u2022 0.3 % swap fee collected in the pool (adds to k over time).  \u2022 First liquidity provider sets the initial price ratio.  \u2022 Subsequent providers must supply tokens in the current ratio.  \u2022 LP tokens are minted proportionally to the share of pool liquidity.  \u2022 Slippage protection via `minAmountOut` parameter on swaps.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AMM.sol":"AMM"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/AMM.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7598c35041eab20836e8160a3a308941c8fffab8b0e1df925656e7a19b69ad5a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://888d3dd628ae8ee8ea956bbff6dc9f25e5dad03c254be99a9fd71c71277eb933","dweb:/ipfs/QmQ7bT4NWog7A7sm6QeKJb4vSKthzWxHAztHzJor6bEZUz"]},"src/ERC20Token.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3f547471480ae0b0ba87fb0c060dc10b052deb1f18c251a20ae18bba8bfffb60","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c51c50f070afc65cc80d5179d9a4d40c418ff90f355801ea71523b516047f2df","dweb:/ipfs/QmZnTM4Z5WtzCrC9U2pcUa3V7BCdyoK2LVi5wQ9w7GXmNm"]},"src/LPToken.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6108824f32e17eb3dcf16ff719832d075ecc72048dd3e070ec2cd3f5794d85c4","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a6646fdece0a3e749940003348753ff5ce1a971af176dc3a3997c154188ce08e","dweb:/ipfs/QmZZ39gTEvY1RW9PpAXgtBbPkDSPqsY7H6XzUJSd2uqDqv"]}},"version":1}

addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256,uin.details: First provider sets the price. Subsequent providers must match         the current ratio; excess `amountBDesired` is returned implicitly         (callers should set `amountBDesired` to maximum they are willing).

params.amountADesired: Amount of tokenA the caller wants to deposit.
params.amountBDesired: Maximum amount of tokenB the caller is willing to deposit.

params.lpAmount: Amount of LP tokens to burn.

params.amountIn: Exact amount of tokenIn to swap.
params.minAmountOut: Minimum amount of output token (slippage protection).
params.tokenIn: Address of the input token (must be tokenA or tokenB).

getAmountOut(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Compute output amount given input amount and reserves.         Applies 0.3 % fee: amountOut = (amountIn * 997 * reserveOut) / (reserveIn * 1000 + amountIn * 997)

getPrice().notice: Returns current pool price as tokenB per tokenA (18 decimals).

swap(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Swap an exact amount of one token for the other.
